sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check what changed after clicking on the left blue square. I need to compare the before and after frames to see if anything changed.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after the mouse click
print("Last action result:", last_action_result)
print()

# Compare before and after
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

before_seg = before.segmentation
after_seg = after.segmentation

print(f"Before nodes: {len(before_seg['nodes'])}, After nodes: {len(after_seg['nodes'])}")
print()

# Check if any node properties changed
before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before_seg['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after_seg['nodes']}

for nid in set(list(before_nodes.keys()) + list(after_nodes.keys())):
    bn = before_nodes.get(nid)
    an = after_nodes.get(nid)
    if bn is None:
        print(f"Node {nid}: NEW - color={an['color']}, pixels={an['pixels']}")
    elif an is None:
        print(f"Node {nid}: REMOVED - was color={bn['color']}, pixels={bn['pixels']}")
    elif bn['pixels'] != an['pixels'] or bn['color'] != an['color'] or bn['hash'] != an['hash']:
        print(f"Node {nid}: CHANGED - pixels {bn['pixels']}->{an['pixels']}, color {bn['color']}->{an['color']}")
    else:
        pass  # unchanged

print()
# Check board changed
print("Board changed:", last_action_result.get('board_changed'))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

</parameter>
